feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: The 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule and how to watch
entry.content: With 104 World Cup games being played in the U.S., Canada and Mexico, it's like "a Super Bowl every single day for five weeks," U.S. team captain Tim Ream told CBS News.

entry.title: Potential first tropical cyclone of the year developing in the Gulf
entry.content: Forecasters have issued an advisory for the potential first tropical cyclone of the 2026 hurricane season, warning it could develop into a tropical storm by Wednesday.

entry.title: Iran says deal with U.S. requires Israeli forces to leave Lebanon
entry.content: Iran's foreign minister says Israeli troops can't remain in Lebanon under the pending deal with the U.S.

entry.title: Detainees moved out of "Alligator Alcatraz" over hurricane concerns, ICE says
entry.content: ICE has moved detainees out of a controversial soft-sided detention center in the Florida Everglades known as "Alligator Alcatraz," a spokesperson said, citing safety concerns around hurricane season.

entry.title: Trump-backed Barry Moore projected to win runoff in Alabama GOP Senate primary
entry.content: Rep. Barry Moore won the Republican Senate runoff in Alabama on Tuesday night, CBS News projects, defeating political newcomer and U.S. Navy Seal Jared Hudson.

entry.title: Rick Jackson wins Republican nomination for governor in Georgia
entry.content: Rick Jackson wins Republican nomination for governor in Georgia

entry.title: Trump-backed Rep. Mike Collins projected to win Georgia GOP Senate primary runoff
entry.content: Rep. Mike Collins will face off against Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff in November as Republicans look to Georgia to deliver a key GOP victory that could determine control of the Senate.

entry.title: Latest U.S. strike on alleged drug boat kills 1, leaves 2 survivors, Pentagon says
entry.content: Critics have questioned the overall legality of the boat strikes as well as their effectiveness since the U.S. military began them in September 2025.

entry.title: Argentina is defending its World Cup title, and its fans are more obsessed than ever
entry.content: Some Argentina fans shelled out tens of thousands of dollars to follow the World Cup defending champions around the U.S. One group made a 20-hour drive to Tuesday’s opening match in Kansas City against Algeria, living on sandwiches, to save money

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
The wise man is the one that makes you think that he is dumb.
Lucky Numbers: 36, 27, 56, 24, 48, 38

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Add half a cup of lemon juice to your laundry to brighten whites.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: The average chocolate bar has 8 insects' legs in it.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Robert Greene
entry.content: “Never whine, never complain, never try to justify yourself.” — Robert Greene

entry.title: Trump administration uses hydrogen peroxide against algae in Reflecting Pool
entry.content: President Donald Trump's remodeled Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool has turned chartreuse from an algal bloom

entry.title: The Dell XPS 13 laptop is available starting today
entry.content: The Dell XPS 13 is now available, starting at $599.

entry.title: What should Sixers do with Dominick Barlow's team option for 2026-27?
entry.content: One has to wonder what the Philadelphia 76ers should do with Dominick Barlow's team option for the 2026-27 season.

entry.title: Keba Keita on what he can bring to a team: 'I'm an effort, energy guy, it doesn't matter what team I'm on'
entry.content: Keba Keita on what he can bring to a team: 'I'm an effort, energy guy, it doesn't matter what team I'm on'

entry.title: When it comes to comparison, I think the role that I …
entry.content: When it comes to comparison, I think the role that I …

entry.title: You play pick-up with some pros, and some of them …
entry.content: You play pick-up with some pros, and some of them …

entry.title: The most dominant basketball player ever in the paint, …
entry.content: The most dominant basketball player ever in the paint, …

entry.title: Sprinkler malfunctions at halftime of Iraq-Norway World Cup match at Gillette Stadium
entry.content: A large stream of water spurted for several seconds from a sprinkler on the edge of the area in front of the goal in which Erling Haaland scored twice to give Norway a 2-1 halftime lead. The grass appeared discolored around the offending sprinkler head as groundskeepers ran out to attend to the problem.

entry.title: Cigars, a Canceled Lacrosse Season and the Scandal Rocking a Massachusetts Town
entry.content: A graduation photo ended Ipswich’s playoff run, sparking outrage, confrontations and a ‘CSI-level investigation.’

entry.title: In boost to Musk, Justice Department seeks to dismiss air pollution lawsuit against xAI data center
entry.content: The Trump administration is helping one of Elon Musk's companies fight a civil rights lawsuit that alleges it is illegally running dozens of natural gas turbines to power a $20 billion data center in Mississippi.

entry.title: Father's Day Gift Guide 2026: Best 4K Ultra HD movies
entry.content: "Steven Spielberg: The Spotlight Collection," "Jackie Chan's Breakout Hits!: Limited Edition," "Ben-Hur," "Monty Python's Life of Brian," "Alice in Wonderland: 75th Anniversary Edition," "Westworld: Limited Edition," "Hamilton: Collector's Edition" and "All the President's Men" are some last-minute movie gift ideas for Father's Day.

entry.title: The Webb telescope has captured its first 'bulge fossil fragment'
entry.content: The funny-sounding name offers new insights into galaxy formation.

entry.title: RFK Jr. Orders American Exposed to Hantavirus to Stay Quarantined Against Medical Advice
entry.content: The health secretary says cruise passenger Angela Perryman has to stay isolated in Nebraska despite a CDC report advising otherwise.

entry.title: Jair Bolsonaro’s son sentenced to four years in jail for seeking US interference in father’s Brazil coup trial
entry.content: Brazil supreme court finds that Eduardo Bolsonaro – who resides in the US - tried to get sanctions put on judges trying ex-president over coup plotBrazil’s supreme court has sentenced Eduardo Bolsonaro to four years and two months in prison after finding him guilty of courting US ⁠interference in his father’s coup plot trial last year.The office of Brazil’s ‌prosecutor general had ‌charged Eduardo Bolsonaro – who lives in the US - courting interference from the Trump administration to help Jair Bolsonaro’s case, by imposing sanctions on the court’s justices and tariffs on Brazilian goods. Continue reading...

entry.title: Skydivers killed in Missouri plane crash found thrills and peace through jumping
entry.content: Skydivers killed in Missouri plane crash found thrills and peace through jumping

entry.title: SpaceX Stock Has Climbed About 50%. The ‘Flippers’ Are Kicking Themselves.
entry.content: The rocket-and-satellite company’s market cap surpassed Amazon in its first few days of trading.

entry.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
entry.content: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.

entry.title: SpaceX Makes $60 Billion AI Purchase
entry.content: Plus, details emerge on U.S.-Iran deal and Robinhood cuts jobs

entry.title: Winning strategy to prevent diabetes and related chronic diseases
entry.content: In the U.S., 115 million adults have prediabetes, which is tied to heart disease and other health problems. A 20-year follow-up to a landmark diabetes study shows lifestyle interventions cut the risk.

entry.title: Chick-fil-A's reign is over. See who is now the top fast food chain
entry.content: Chick-fil-A's reign is over. See who is now the top fast food chain

entry.title: A person is in custody in a Chicago cross burning investigation, police say
entry.content: Police in Chicago say a person is in custody in an investigation of a large cross set on fire in a well-known park

entry.title: Russ Stoner’s time as York High head football coach appears to be ending
entry.content: The York City school board agenda for June 17 does not list Russ Stoner to be approved as head football coach.

entry.title: Women's T20 World Cup: Ireland slump to 57-5 against ruthless England
entry.content: Follow live text, BBC Radio 5 Live Sport commentary and in-play video highlights as England face Ireland in the Women's T20 World Cup in Southampton.

entry.title: How to watch the 2026 KPMG Women's PGA Championship
entry.content: Minjee Lee enters Minnesota as the reigning KPMG Women's PGA Championship but faces the task of stopping world No. 1 Nelly Korda, who has yet to lose a major event this year.

entry.title: Iraq vs. Norway (live updates): Boston Stadium hosts 2nd 2026 FIFA World Cup match today
entry.content: Iraq and Norway are set to end their respective World Cup droughts of 40 and 28 years.

entry.title: Knights wise to move on from Torts
entry.content: John Tortorella was fine for the interim but it's time to give Ryan Craig his shot to be an NHL head coach .

entry.title: ICE says relaxed detention standards 'reduce the burden' on contractors running its lockups
entry.content: Contractors running Immigration and Customs Enforcement facilities can rely more heavily on artificial intelligence tools to communicate with detainees and continue refusing to pay the minimum wage for detainees' "voluntary work," under relaxed detention standards released Monday.

entry.title: Norrie beaten at Queen's on injury return
entry.content: Cameron Norrie is beaten by Alejandro Davidovich Fokina at Queen's in the Briton's first singles match since suffering a rib injury in May.

entry.title: Cape Verde - Scotland's template against Morocco?
entry.content: Former Scotland players Neil McCann and Willie Miller share their thoughts on how Steve Clarke's side might find success against Morocco.

entry.title: France, Senegal fans share love of soccer at FIFA World Cup
entry.content: Pan-African pride mixed with a love of French striker Kylian Mbappé at the 2026 FIFA World Cup on June 16 at MetLife Stadium.

entry.title: Feds Charge 15 Minnesota Protesters in Alleged Anti-ICE Conspiracy
entry.content: Prosecutors say the defendants were part of an organized effort to impede immigration enforcement officers in the Twin Cities.

entry.title: Suspect in deadly shooting of National Guard troops pleads not guilty to new charges
entry.content: A man accused of shooting two National Guard troops near the White House, killing one of them, has pleaded not guilty to charges in a new indictment

entry.title: Judge upholds the conviction of former Wisconsin judge Hannah Dugan for helping immigrant evade ICE
entry.content: A federal judge has declined to overturn a Wisconsin judge’s obstruction conviction for helping a man evade immigration officers who showed up at a courtroom looking to detain him

entry.title: Thwarted Plot to Attack White House Fight Involved Drones and Snipers, Officials Say
entry.content: Multiple people were arrested in connection with an alleged plan to target the UFC match with thousands in attendance, including Trump.

entry.title: Federal prosecutors charge 15 people with impeding agents during Minnesota immigration crackdown
entry.content: Federal prosecutors have charged 15 people with impeding federal agents during a massive immigration surge in Minnesota earlier this year

entry.title: Toronto police say dozens of shootings are linked to ‘multilayered’ gun-for-hire network
entry.content: Young adults and teens are being recruited through apps like Telegram and paid to carry out attacks, officials sayPolice investigators in Toronto have said that dozens of shootings – including one at the US consulate in March – are linked to a “multilayered” gun-for-hire network that is also responsible for attacks on synagogues around Canada’s largest city.Toronto’s police chief, Myron Demkiw, told reporters on Tuesday that young adults and teenagers are being recruited through encrypted messaging apps such as Signal, Telegram and WhatsApp by “bad actors” and paid by the networks to carry out the attacks. Shooters are required to film their attacks in order to get paid. Continue reading...

entry.title: Red, white and green: Interior Dept. kicks off efforts to kill algae growth in Reflecting Pool
entry.content: Algae is again plaguing the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, and the White House's newest plan to fix the $14.2 million makeover is hydrogen peroxide.

entry.title: Serena Williams live score, results, highlights from 2026 Berlin Open doubles with Karolina Muchova
entry.content: Serena Williams continues her return to tennis at the Berlin Open doubles. The Sporting News is tracking the score, result and highlights from her doubles match.

entry.title: Spain vs. Saudi Arabia tickets: Prices, seats, date for 2026 FIFA World Cup group match
entry.content: Spain vs. Saudi Arabia: Here's what to know about tickets, date and more for the FIFA World Cup match.

entry.title: France vs. Senegal projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup 2026 Group I game at MetLife Stadium
entry.content: Favorites France open their 2026 FIFA World Cup slate with a culturally familiar opponent as they meet African giants Senegal to begin Group I play.

entry.title: Phillies predicted to trade for $5.2M Gold Glove finalist, power bat to fill Adolis Garcia void
entry.content: The Phillies are going to need a bat in the lineup for sure after Adolis Garcia's injury. In this potential trade it comes in the form of an outfielder who has a good bat and elite defense.

entry.title: Despite Trump's assurances, shippers wait and see on Strait of Hormuz
entry.content: President Trump says there's a "safe, secure and pristine" route through the Strait of Hormuz, but major shipping companies aren't convinced.

entry.title: Why Brendan Sorsby's NFL fate could depend on Kayshon Boutte, Hunter Dekkers gambling precedent
entry.content: With Brendan Sorsby heading to the NFL, the next question is how the league will handle his gamblimg violations.

entry.title: World Cup white power controversy, explained: What to know about FIFA referee accused of making hand gesture
entry.content: Here's the latest on what the Australian referee's gesture was and how it has stirred up controversy.

entry.title: Trump, Kemp choose opposing candidates in Georgia Republican Senate runoff election
entry.content: Voters across multiple states will cast their ballots today to decide local and state elections. Georgia voters will decide which candidates continue to the general election in several key runoff contests. CBS News' Fin Gómez has more context.

entry.title: Braves-Red Sox trade pitch sends Cy Young arm to Atlanta in urgent fix amid Spencer Strider injury
entry.content: The Braves are in dire need of another starter after Spencer Strider's injury. In this trade they land a very reliable veteran that can immediately fill Strider's spot in the rotation.

entry.title: Andrew Bird gets 'painfully sincere' at mental health benefit concert celebrating 'The Pitt'
entry.content: Intimacy was key to the sold-out "Andrew Bird and Friends" concert, which took over Largo to benefit mental health organizations for healthcare workers.

entry.title: World awaits U.S.-Iran nuclear negotiations as some Strait of Hormuz traffic resumes
entry.content: The U.S. and Iran are set to officially sign a framework agreement on Friday, as the world awaits the outcome of the nuclear negotiations expected to follow. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Will Todman, a senior fellow at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, have more.

entry.title: Alleged plot targeting White House UFC event involved explosive drones, documents show
entry.content: The alleged plot targeting the White House's UFC event on Sunday involved drones and explosives, court documents show. At least one suspect, 19-year-old Tycen Proper, has been arrested in Ohio. CBS News' Jake Rosen has more.

entry.title: Feds reveal new details of alleged plot to attack White House UFC event
entry.content: The FBI said it disrupted an attempt to attack Sunday's UFC America 250 event at the White House, with court records detailing an alleged plot to use small drones carrying explosives.

entry.title: How Gavin Newsom's claims about a DOJ investigation could impact a potential 2028 presidential run
entry.content: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said that the Justice Department is investigating him and his wife in a video released Monday. CBS News California's Julie Watts breaks down how it might impact a potential 2028 presidential run for the popular Democrat.

entry.title: SpaceX to buy AI coding assistant Cursor for $60 billion
entry.content: The deal comes just days after SpaceX went public in the largest IPO in history, raising $75 billion to help fund its expansion.

entry.title: Live with a partner? You may be sharing more microbes than you think
entry.content: A large study finds you may share about a quarter of your oral and gut microbes with the people you live with. Should you worry? We asked the experts.

entry.title: Georgia and Alabama GOP runoffs and more primaries to watch today
entry.content: Voters are casting their ballots in four states and the District of Columbia on Tuesday, including the runoff race in Georgia to take on Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff.

entry.title: Fox versus Telemundo: How hydration breaks and commercials are disrupting World Cup viewing
entry.content: When the World Cup kicked off last week, FIFA introduced hydration breaks, a mandated 3-minute window for players to rest. Many networks are utilizing this pause in the match as a new advertising window. Some soccer fans aren't happy with the viewing experience.

entry.title: KFC unveils brand revamp with new menu, drinks and store formats
entry.content: KFC unveils brand revamp with new menu, drinks and store formats

entry.title: Lam Research (LRCX) Stands Out on Strong Demand
entry.content: Lam Research (LRCX) Stands Out on Strong Demand

entry.title: Magnitude 6.3 earthquake rattles China, at least 1 dead, multiple injured
entry.content: Magnitude 6.3 earthquake rattles China, at least 1 dead, multiple injured

entry.title: I graduated from UC Berkeley with a job lined up, but I was quickly laid off. I found my next job by cold emailing.
entry.content: I graduated from UC Berkeley with a job lined up, but I was quickly laid off. I found my next job by cold emailing.

entry.title: U.S. Allies Use G-7 to Focus Trump’s Attention Back to Ukraine
entry.content: The president has spent the past four months focused on Iran, but the Group of Seven summit has left him little choice but to turn his attention back to Ukraine.

entry.title: US paying almost $25,000 a month to store unusable contraceptives stuck in Belgium
entry.content: US paying almost $25,000 a month to store unusable contraceptives stuck in Belgium

entry.title: 👵🏽 40 and clubless: granny becomes a star after epic match
entry.content: Vozinha, Cape Verde’s national team goalkeeper, had an unusual day as he became the biggest name at the World Cup this Monday (15).The 40-year-old veteran made crucial saves and was named man of the...

entry.title: Vote for the Treasure Coast's best boys athlete during the 2025-26 season
entry.content: We highlight 10 top high school boys athletes on the Treasure Coast. Vote for your favorite to be named Team of the Year.

entry.title: Serie A defender wants to wait for Barcelona despite Chelsea and Atletico Madrid interest
entry.content: Barcelona started the summer transfer window like a bullet train, moving ahead of everyone else to wrap up a deal for Newcastle United star Anthony Gordon.Slowly, though, since that deal happened, the...

entry.title: India orders temporary ban on Telegram over exam fraud concerns
entry.content: The restrictions include a nationwide ban on Telegram until June 22 and a requirement to disable the app's message editing feature.

entry.title: Hornchurch bring in Barnet defender Kizzi
entry.content: National League newcomers Hornchurch sign defender Joe Kizzi from League Two club Barnet.

entry.title: Harrogate sign midfielder Williams
entry.content: Harrogate Town sign King's Lynn midfielder Morgan Williams for an undisclosed fee on a two-year deal.

entry.title: Offside rule in soccer, explained: The simple definition and how referees still manage to get it wrong
entry.content: The Sporting News breaks down the offside rule, how it is enforced and why it's a part of the game.

entry.title: OMV Petrom moves ahead with Gabare project in Bulgaria
entry.content: OMV Petrom moves ahead with Gabare project in Bulgaria

entry.title: SpaceX to buy Cursor AI coding agent operator Anysphere for $60 billion
entry.content: SpaceX to buy Cursor AI coding agent operator Anysphere for $60 billion

entry.title: Criminals are buying stolen Medicare identities in bulk at $8 each — then fraudulently billing the government billions
entry.content: Criminals are buying stolen Medicare identities in bulk at $8 each — then fraudulently billing the government billions

entry.title: Ultra-rich Americans are turning to a $40 billion industry to help them flee the US. Here’s where they're going instead
entry.content: Ultra-rich Americans are turning to a $40 billion industry to help them flee the US. Here’s where they're going instead

entry.title: College baseball games on TV today: Full schedule, times, channels, streams to watch CWS Tuesday
entry.content: A pair of unexpected matchups are on tap as the CWS opens in Omaha.

entry.title: College World Series bracket 2026: Full schedule, scores, TV channels, live streams for NCAA baseball CWS
entry.content: This year's tournament in Omaha promises to be a thriller after a flurry of upsets earlier in the tournament. Here's when and where to watch every game.

entry.title: Norway's soccer chant, explained: The history behind 'Ro! Ro!' bringing viking energy to World Cup
entry.content: Here's the rundown on Norway's rattling chant that will likely be heard during the team's 2026 World Cup matches.

entry.title: Where to watch Australia vs. Turkey live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Group D match
entry.content: Here's how to watch the Australia vs. Turkey World Cup Group D Match, including live stream, TV channel, start time and more.

entry.title: Where to watch Iraq vs. Norway live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Group I match
entry.content: Iraq vs. Norway kickoff time: Here’s how to watch the World Cup match on TV and live stream. The Sporting News takes you through all the information you need to follow the game.

entry.title: Kevin Warsh's Fed debut comes at a pivotal moment for global monetary policy
entry.content: Kevin Warsh's Fed debut comes at a pivotal moment for global monetary policy

entry.title: Spain next World Cup match: Fixture schedule, start time, draw bracket as La Roja face Saudi Arabia
entry.content: Spain's World Cup schedule: When the European champions play their next match as Lamine Yamal, Pedri and company aim to progress from Group H.

entry.title: With war likely over, Iranian rulers must face demands of angry, embittered population
entry.content: With war likely over, Iranian rulers must face demands of angry, embittered population

entry.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Carter Page case against FBI officials
entry.content: The Supreme Court on Monday declined to take up Carter Page's case against former FBI officials who oversaw what the government now concedes was an ill-advised attempt to surveil his activities during the 2016 campaign.

entry.title: Promoter of election conspiracy theories wins GOP primary for Nevada secretary of state
entry.content: Former state lawmaker Jim Marchant has won the Republican nomination for Nevada secretary of state

entry.title: Online portal used to send US deliveries to Cuba stops taking orders
entry.content: A key platform that Cubans in the U.S. use to send money and goods to relatives in Cuba has stopped operations

entry.title: American doctor who recovered from Ebola back in U.S., says he's "feeling well"
entry.content: Dr. Peter Stafford, his wife, Rebekah Stafford, and their four children all arrived safely on Monday, according to Serge, a Pennsylvania-based Christian missions organization.

entry.title: 6/15: The Takeout with Major Garrett
entry.content: Details still slim on U.S.-Iran deal; California Gov. Gavin Newsom says the Justice Department is investigating him and his wife.

entry.title: 8 dead in B-52 bomber crash at Edwards Air Force Base in California, officials say
entry.content: The aircraft was on a routine test mission at Edwards airfield, located in the western Mojave Desert, about 100 miles northeast of Los Angeles.

entry.title: Middle East expert on U.S.-Iran deal
entry.content: An initial agreement between the U.S. and Iran to extend their shaky ceasefire is nearing formal signing. Mona Yacoubian, director of the Middle East program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, joins with analysis.
